qa_pairs.question: How can I quickly mark all new publications as enabled by computational resources on the CCV submission form?
qa_pairs.answer: To mark all new publications as enabled by computational resources, you can click on the "Select all new" button within the CCV submission form.

qa_pairs.question: What is the process to indicate that none of the new publications were enabled by computational resources?
qa_pairs.answer: If none of the new publications were enabled by computational resources, you should click on the "Clear all new" button to indicate this.

qa_pairs.question: When reviewing publications one-by-one on the CCV submission form, how do you mark a publication as not enabled by computational resources?
qa_pairs.answer: When reviewing publications one-by-one, you must click twice on a publication to mark it as not enabled by computational resources. The first click indicates it was enabled (a checkmark appears), and the second click removes the checkmark, indicating it was not enabled.
